claim: Use JSON output format with defined schemas to enable multi-pathway routing via conditional statements in agent workflows
actionable: Define an output schema with enum values (e.g., 'returning', 'purchasing', 'info') and use if/else nodes to route to different agent paths based on the classification output
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Implement guardrails (moderation, PII detection, jailbreak detection, hallucination checks) as dedicated nodes before agent processing to ensure production-ready systems
actionable: Add guardrail nodes early in workflows with toggles for PII (email, phone, SSN), moderation (hateful speech), jailbreak detection, and hallucination verification against knowledge bases
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Attach file search (knowledge bases) to agents by uploading PDFs/documents to create vector stores, enabling agents to reference company-specific context
actionable: Upload product catalogs, FAQs, or internal docs as PDFs to file search nodes; agents automatically embed and retrieve relevant chunks with configurable max_results
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Use web search tools in agent workflows to provide agents access to real-time information beyond training data (e.g., current events, prices)
actionable: Add web search node with optional domain restrictions or location filters to enable agents to research live information during task execution
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Design custom interactive widgets (checkout, weather, notifications) by uploading widget files to display dynamic data-rich outputs directly in chat
actionable: Create or download widget files from widget studio, reference them in agent output format settings, prompt agents to populate widget fields with data from tasks
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Include chat history toggle in agents to let models reference previous messages for context or disable it for single-shot, context-free responses
actionable: Toggle 'include chat history' setting; enable for multi-turn reasoning, disable if you want isolated responses or to reduce token usage
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Use MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers as integrated tools to connect agents to Gmail, Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, Shopify, Zapier and 8000+ APIs
actionable: Add MCP server tools in agent node; select from pre-integrated services (Gmail, Zapier) or add custom MCP server endpoints to unlock external integrations
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Use 'while loop' nodes to execute agents or tool sequences repeatedly until specific conditions are met (e.g., until a variable reaches a target value)
actionable: Wrap nodes in while loop, define exit condition using variables (e.g., 'continue while count < 5'), agents iterate until condition becomes false
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Add user approval nodes with custom messages to pause agent workflows and request human approval before proceeding to next steps
actionable: Insert user approval node with custom message; users see approve/reject buttons; route to different paths based on their choice
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Customize chat UI styling (colors, fonts, radius, density) via the playground to match brand and control user experience without code
actionable: Access widget playground; toggle dark/light mode, accent colors, typography (font, size), radius (sharp/pill), density (compact/spacious) settings
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour

claim: Build conversational e-commerce agents by chaining agents: classification agent -> pathway-specific agent (return/purchase/info) -> user approval -> widget display
actionable: Create agents in sequence: first classifies user intent via JSON output, routes via if/else, runs specialized agents, adds approval step, outputs widgets with results
source_title: Master the NEW OpenAI Agent Builder In 1 Hour
